name: Oppo Find X9 Ultra
highlights:
Not announced yet
235 g
Android 16, ColorOS 16
512GB/1TB storage, no card slot

BODY.Build: Glass front, aluminum alloy frame, silicone polymer back (eco leather)
BODY: IP68/IP69 dust tight and water resistant (high pressure water jets; immersible up to 1.5m for 30 min)

DISPLAY.Type: LTPO AMOLED, 1B colors, 144Hz, 2160Hz PWM, Dolby Vision, HDR Vivid, HDR10+, 800 nits (typ), 2200 nits (HBM), 3600 nits (peak)

PLATFORM.Chipset: Qualcomm SM8850-AC Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 (3 nm)
PLATFORM.CPU: Octa-core (2x4.6 GHz Oryon V3 Phoenix L + 6x3.62 GHz Oryon V3 Phoenix M)

MAIN CAMERA.Quad:
200 MP, f/1.8, (wide), PDAF, OIS
200 MP, (periscope telephoto), PDAF, OIS, 3x optical zoom
50 MP, (periscope telephoto), PDAF, OIS, 10x optical zoom
50 MP, f/2.0, 15mm, 120˚ (ultrawide), 1/2.75", 0.64µm, PDAF
MAIN CAMERA.Features: Laser AF, color spectrum sensor, Hasselblad Color Calibration, LED flash, HDR, panorama

FEATURES.Sensors: Fingerprint (under display, ultrasonic), accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass
FEATURES: Emergency SOS via satellite (messages and calls) - available in Oppo Find X9 Ultra Satellite version

BATTERY.Charging:
100W wired, 18W PD, 18W QC, 55W PPS
50W wireless
10W reverse wireless
